name: Can AI be my lawyer in small claims Phoenix?

mainEntity.name: Can AI be my lawyer in small claims Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, AI can't appear—use yourself but verify all.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
No, AI can't represent; pro se only, but risky hallucinations.[4] AZ small claims self-help.

**Key factors:**
- No AI privilege.
- Hallucinate 1/6+ legal.[4]
- Sanctions possible.

Use court forms; real advice better. Avoid AI filings.[4] Prep strong.
